G S R 68 E —In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Ftecticn 11 of the Salariesan'd Allowances of Ministers Act, 1052 (58 of 1952), ^ e Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Ministers1 (AllowRrceR. Medical Trcalmcnt and Other Privileges) Rules, 1957* namely :— 1. (1) These rulea may be called the Ministers' (Allowances, Medical Treatment und other Privileges) Amendment Rules, 1972. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their'publication in the Official Gazetti. 2. In the Ministers' (Allowances, Medical Treatment end other Privileges"; Rules, x957,— (1) in clause (iv) of rule' z, the following words shall he added at The end., namely:~ "or a coupe in the air-conditioned sleeper class". (2) after rule 24 the following rule shell be inserted before Section I, namely :— "2A. Calculation of road mileage and mileage allowance in kilometers.*—-The road mileage andthc mileage allowance payable under these rules ahall be calculated with reference to distance in kilometers."; ( *97 ) -- 1 of 3 -- 198 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA EXTRAORDINARY [PARI H~ (3) rule 9 shall be re-numbered aB sub-rule (1) thereof and,— (a) in sub-rule (r) as so re-numbered; for the words "A Minister may when travelling 1 1 a reserved compartment un requisition be allowed, at his option, either".] the following worda shall be substituted, namely •*- "A Minister, when travelling in a reserved compartment on requisition shall be entitled' without payment to accommodation for two personal servants and may be allowed at his option ^ either"; (b) after sub-rule (1) as so re-numbered, the following sub-rule shall be inserted,namely.— "(2) A Minister when travelling in a reserved compartment in a train the fare in respect of which includes, charges for meals provided in the trainj the allowance for incidentals or actual travelling expenses shall be restricted to one-half of the amount to which he ia entitled under sub-rule ( I ) . " J (4) in rule 10, after the words and figure "under rule 7, he " , the following words shall be inserted, mamely :— "shall be entlited without payment to accommodation for two personal servant s[ and"; (5) in sub-rule (2) of rule 12, for the words "annas eight per mile", the words "thirty-two paiae per kilometer" shall be substituted; (6) in clause (a) of sub-rule (1) of rule 13, for the words "six maunds", wherever they occur, the figures and word "224 kilograms'* shall be substituted} (7) in sub-rule (3) of rule 17, for the words "five miles", the words "eight kilometers" shal be substituted.
